name_cn:
#Small Signature Bucket Bag in Grey
This Signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from grey calfskin, it features tonal pebbled leather details and a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious compartment features a snap closure and leather strap opening, offering a secure place for daily essentials, with an interior pocket for added refinement. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing for easy carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Metal snap closure and leather strap opening; top leather handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap; interior pocket
Model: 2366
Dimensions: 21×19×11cm (L×H×W)
Fits 1 smartphone, 1 wallet, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick
